items.title: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DRC forest
items.dek: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.body: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
items.dek: A large section of the giant Morandi motorway bridge crumbled and collapsed on to the railway tracks below.
items.body: A large section of the giant Morandi motorway bridge crumbled and collapsed on to the railway tracks below.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Argentina face fine for Falklands banner in semi-final win
items.dek: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country'
items.body: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.author: IriLine Desk
